name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions a hardened Nginx reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local), including UFW firewall, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, SSH hardening, sysctl security tuning, and self-signed TLS certificate generation.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual-layer caching tier with Memcached and Redis (with password authentication), including a post-install Ruby block hack to strip deprecated directives from the redisio-generated Redis config file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application by cloning a Git repository, setting up a Python virtual environment, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, generating a .env configuration file, and creating a systemd service unit for uvicorn.
